description: Nana Mifune was a girl who became Collector for the Alien. Nana is a nice smart girl. She had realized she got the recommendation only because Shuichi declined it. name: Nea Campbell
description: __Species:__ Noah __Height:__ 177cm (5' 9 3/4") Nea D. Campbell also referred to as "The Fourteenth", "The Pianist" and "The Musician" - was a traitor and a disowned member of the Noah Family. He is the younger twin brother of Mana Walker and the adopted uncle of Allen Walker (with Allen also his host). Aside from the 9th member of the Noah Family Road Kamelot, and the Earl of Millennium, Nea is the only person who is able to control Noah's Ark, which he achieves by playing his piano.

name: Purin
description: Purin is a pink Pokémon with a spherical body. It has pointed ears with black insides and large, blue eyes. It has small, stubby arms and slightly longer feet. On top of its head is a curled tuft of fur. Its body is filled with air and, as seen in Pokémon Stadium, Purin can deflate until it is flat. Purin can use its eyes to mesmerize opponents. name: Raye Penber
description: Raye Penber is an American Investigator from the FBI, who was sent to Japan along with 11 other FBI agents to track down Kira. Raye was assigned to investigate the Yagami family for any suspicious behavior; specifically focusing on [Light Yagami](https://anilist.co/character/80/Light-Yagami). Raye is engaged to a former FBI agent, [Naomi Misora](https://anilist.co/character/4959/Naomi-Misora).
